user.title: Add a news feed
user.description: How would you like to add your feed?

preset.title: Choose a feed
preset.description: Hand-picked feeds that work well with this integration. Pick one — we'll fetch a sample to make sure it's reachable.

data.name: Display name (optional — leave blank to use the feed's own name)
data.scan_interval: How often should we check for updates? (seconds)

custom.title: Custom feed URL
custom.description: Paste any RSS or Atom feed URL. We'll verify it's reachable before saving.

data.name: Display name
data.scan_interval: How often should we check for updates? (seconds)
data.local_time: Show dates in your local timezone

error.invalid_url: That doesn't look like a valid http(s) URL.
error.fetch_failed: We couldn't reach that feed. Check the URL and try again.
error.timeout: The feed took too long to respond. Try again later or check the URL.
error.interval_too_short: Please set the interval to at least 60 seconds.
error.unknown_preset: That preset is no longer available. Pick another one.

init.title: Feed settings
init.description: Tweak how often we refresh and how dates are formatted.

data.scan_interval: How often should we check for updates? (seconds)
data.local_time: Show dates in your local timezone

error.interval_too_short: Please set the interval to at least 60 seconds.
